description: Karam Lakshman discusses the importance of Layer 0 deep infrastructure in emerging markets, emphasizing the need for foundational services to support connectivity and broadband access in regions like India. He highlights the transition from traditional cable operators to internet service providers and the demand for high-speed internet.
topic_summary: Karam Lakshman presents the concept of Layer 0 deep infrastructure, focusing on its role in providing essential connectivity in emerging markets. He illustrates the challenges and opportunities in India, where demand for broadband exceeds supply, and outlines the shift from cable to fiber optic services.
